'''savozo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:nicator|nicator]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-v-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nicator|nicator]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| savozo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:sævezeth|sævezeth]] || [[word:sævezej|sævezej]] || [[word:sævezesh|sævezesh]] || [[word:sæveze|sæveze]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:savovozoth|savovozoth]] || [[word:savovozoj|savovozoj]] || [[word:savovozosh|savovozosh]] || [[word:savovozo|savovozo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:savozoth|savozoth]] || [[word:savozoj|savozoj]] || [[word:savozosh|savozosh]] || [[word:savozo|savozo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:savofzoth|savofzoth]] || [[word:savofzoj|savofzoj]] || [[word:savofzosh|savofzosh]] || [[word:savofzof|savofzof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:savozotho|savozotho]] || [[word:savozojo|savozojo]] || [[word:savozosho|savozosho]] || [[word:savozoko|savozoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:savozoth|savozoth]] || [[word:savozoj|savozoj]] || [[word:savozosh|savozosh]] || [[word:savozo|savozo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:savozothol|savozothol]] || [[word:savozojol|savozojol]] || [[word:savozoshol|savozoshol]] || [[word:savozokol|savozokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:savozothotho|savozothotho]] || [[word:savozojojo|savozojojo]] || [[word:savozoshosho|savozoshosho]] || [[word:savozoko|savozoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:savozothon|savozothon]] || [[word:savozojon|savozojon]] || [[word:savozoshon|savozoshon]] || [[word:savozokon|savozokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:savozothoro|savozothoro]] || [[word:savozojoro|savozojoro]] || [[word:savozoshoro|savozoshoro]] || [[word:savozokoro|savozokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|b863984}}
